nasb.text: Festus then answered that Paul was being kept in custody at Caesarea and that he himself was about to leave shortly.

esv.text: Festus replied that Paul was being kept at Caesarea and that he himself intended to go there shortly.

cnv.text: 非斯都回答：“保羅現今押在該撒利亞，我就要回到那裡去。”

ccb.text: 非斯都却拒绝道：“保罗现在关押在凯撒利亚，我很快会回到那里。

csbs.text: 于是菲斯特斯说：“保罗正被拘留在凯撒里亚，我自己也很快就要回去。”
